2603.17439.title: Baguan-TS: A Sequence-Native In-Context Learning Model for Time Series Forecasting with Covariates
2603.17439.paper_summary: Transformers enable in-context learning (ICL) for rapid, gradient-free adaptation in time series forecasting, yet most ICL-style approaches rely on tabularized, hand-crafted features, while end-to-end sequence models lack inference-time adaptation. We bridge this gap with a unified framework, Baguan-TS, which integrates the raw-sequence representation learning with ICL, instantiated by a 3D Transformer that attends jointly over temporal, variable, and context axes. To make this high-capacity model practical, we tackle two key hurdles: (i) calibration and training stability, improved with a feature-agnostic, target-space retrieval-based local calibration; and (ii) output oversmoothing, mitigated via context-overfitting strategy. On public benchmark with covariates, Baguan-TS consistently outperforms established baselines, achieving the highest win rate and significant reductions in both point and probabilistic forecasting metrics. Further evaluations across diverse real-world energy datasets demonstrate its robustness, yielding substantial improvements.
2603.17439.paper_summary_zh: Transformer使得在上下文中學習（ICL）成為可能，以便在時間序列預測中快速、無梯度地進行適應，然而大多數ICL風格的方法依賴於表格化的、手工製作的特徵，而端到端的序列模型缺乏推理時的適應。我們通過一個統一的框架Baguan-TS來填補這一空白，該框架將原始序列表示學習與ICL整合，具體體現為一個3DTransformer，該Transformer在時間、變量和上下文軸上共同關注。為了使這個高容量模型實用，我們解決了兩個關鍵障礙：（i）校準和訓練穩定性，通過一種特徵無關的、基於目標空間檢索的局部校準來改善；（ii）輸出過平滑，通過上下文過擬合策略來減輕。在帶有協變量的公共基準測試中，Baguan-TS始終超越既定基準，實現了最高的勝率和在點預測及概率預測指標上顯著的減少。對各種現實世界能源數據集的進一步評估證明了其穩健性，帶來了可觀的改善。
2603.17439.author: Linxiao Yang et.al.
2603.17439.authors: Linxiao Yang, Xue Jiang, Gezheng Xu, Tian Zhou, Min Yang, ZhaoYang Zhu, Linyuan Geng, Zhipeng Zeng, Qiming Chen, Xinyue Gu, Rong Jin, Liang Sun
